channel.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Room W17 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 17, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

May 12, 20:36 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 17/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 17/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack list below might experience a temporarily shutdown during the operation:
W17A01, W17A02, W17A03, W17B01, W17B02, W17B03, W17A04, W17A05, W17A06, W17B04, W17B05, W17B06, W17A07, W17A08, W17A09, W17B07, W17B08, W17B09, W17A10, W17A11, W17A12, W17B10, W17B11, W17B12, W17A13, W17A14, W17A15, W17B13, W17B14, W17B15, W17A16, W17A17, W17A18, W17B16, W17B17, W17B18 , W17A19, W17A20, W17A21, W17B19, W17B20 and W17B21.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L121B09 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 28, 07:00 - 09:00 UTC

Apr 30, 22:20 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 28/05/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 09:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [SBG3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack S333B07 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 28, 02:00 - 03:00 UTC

May 12, 20:17 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack S333B07.

Start time : 28/05/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 03:00 UTC
Service impact : Public and vRack networks will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in S333B07 which doesn't have LACP activated.
However, if LACP is activated, bandwidth perturbation will be observed on Public and vRack networks for servers in S333B07.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA4][Dedicated Servers] - Rack GRA0403D02A maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 25, 12:00 - 16:00 UTC

May 12, 20:25 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 25/05/2026 12:00 UTC
End time : 25/05/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in rack GRA0403D02A will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [YYZ][Network] - Network equipment maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 21, 17:30 - 18:30 UTC

May 7, 19:33 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 21/05/2026 17:30 UTC
End time : 21/05/2026 18:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will have to carry out interventions on multiple network equipment.

List of concerned rack :
- Rack YYZ0101C03B


Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Room WAW0106/WAW0107 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 21, 12:30 - 16:30 UTC

May 11, 20:19 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offering, affecting servers in racks listed below :
- Rack WAW0106A01A
- Rack WAW0106A01B
- Rack WAW0106A02A
- Rack WAW0106A01C
- RackWAW0106A02B
- Rack WAW0106A05A
- Rack WAW0106A05B
- Rack WAW0106A06B
- Rack WAW0106B02C
- Rack WAW0107A05C
- Rack WAW0106A02C
- Rack WAW0106A05C

Start time : 21/05/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 21/05/2026 16:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers in the specified racks with network interfaces configured in LACP will not experience any interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A09 - W17A10 - W17A11 - W17A14 - W17B08 Maintenance Notification
item.description:

Apr 23, 14:13 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer.

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A09
- Rack W17A10
- Rack W17A11
- Rack W17A14
- Rack W17B08

Start time : 19/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 19/05/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS1/4/5][Storage and Backups] - Backup Storage maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 14, 14:00 UTC  -  May 15, 02:00 UTC

May 11, 15:40 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our Backup Storage offer.

Start time : 14/05/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 15/05/2026 02:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, some storage will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 30 minutes.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Backup Storage offering to implement security and performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS1][Storage and Backups] - Backup Storage maintenance notification

item.title: [GRA1][Cooling System] - Rack G115B18 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 13, 06:30 - 14:00 UTC

May 11, 13:24 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in Rack G115B18.

Start time : 13/05/2026 06:30 UTC
End time : 13/05/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in Rack G115B18.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [YYZ][Network] - Network equipment maintenance notification

Completed - The current maintenance has been canceled and she will be rescheduled later.

Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 20/05/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 20/05/2026 15:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will have to carry out interventions on multiple network equipment.

List of concerned rows:
- Row YYZ0101A01
- Row YYZ0101A02
- Row YYZ0101A03

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [SGP1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack 050713C Incident notification
item.description:
May 12, 22:09 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering on rack 050713C has been resolved.

Start time : 12/05/2026 16:53 UTC
End time : 12/05/2026 21:59 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 12, 17:00 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the Rack 050713C .

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 12/05/2026 16:53 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack are no longer able to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack R820L16 incident notification
item.description:
May 12, 13:48 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack R820L16.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 12/05/2026 13:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack R820L16 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA4][Dedicated Servers] - Rack GRA0403D02B incident Notification
item.description:
May 12, 12:19 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 12/05/2026 11:56 UTC
End time : 12/05/2026 12:17 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 12, 12:02 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in Rack GRA0403D02B.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 12/05/2026 11:56 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the Rack GRA0403D02B are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA1][Cooling System] - Rack G121A15 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
May 11, 07:54 UTC
Completed - We would like to inform you that the maintenance on our cooling infrastructure is now completed.
All services are operational.

Thank you for your patience throughout this maintenance.

May 11, 04:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 7, 14:50 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 11/05/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 11/05/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
